title: Jupyter Dyno settings
description: Settings to use when solving a DSGE model

preserve-scroll-position.title: Preserve scroll position
preserve-scroll-position.description: If enabled, the viewer will attempt to preserve its scroll position after re-rendering.

modfile-preprocessor.title: Modfile Preprocessor
modfile-preprocessor.description: How to preprocess the mod file before solving the model.

kernel-restart.title: Restart Kernel on Solve
kernel-restart.description: Restart the kernel everytime the model is solved (for development purpose).

output_type.title: Output Type
output_type.description: Type of output to generate (e.g., markdown, html, etc.)

display_graph.title: Display Graph
display_graph.description: If enabled, graph outputs are displayed in Dyno reports.
